tools.name: query_pol_certificates
tools.description: Query immutable ProofOfLogic certificates stored on Irys Datachain by DJZS Protocol. USE THIS TOOL when you need to verify audit history for an agent or project before delegating work, check FAIL verdicts, or retrieve certificates by Irys tx ID. DO NOT use for on-chain trust scores — use query_agent

tools.name: query_agent_trust
tools.description: Query an agent's DJZS trust score, aggregated on-chain (Base mainnet) from its audit history and indexed via the DJZS subgraph. USE BEFORE delegating work, releasing escrow, or executing agent transactions. Returns totalAudits, pass/fail counts, failRate, latest verdict/risk, and DJZS-S01/DJZS-X01 f

tools.name: verify_pm_trade
tools.description: Deterministic pre-execution audit of a prediction-market trade thesis. Extracts the reasoning, audits it against the calibrated DJZS-M taxonomy (M01 narrative/resolution gap, M02 falsification absent, M03 probability unsourced, M04 consensus-as-edge advisory), and returns PASS->PROCEED, FAIL, or WAI
